Senior Angular Developer
Company: Devapo sp. z o.o.
Location: Wrocław / Remote (Poland)
Type: B2B contract, long-term

About us:
Devapo is a Polish software house delivering enterprise web applications for clients in banking, insurance, and logistics. Our team of 80+ engineers works with modern JavaScript/TypeScript stacks. We value clean code, solid architecture, and continuous improvement.

We are looking for a Senior Angular Developer to join a team building a real-time financial dashboard platform used by 50+ institutional clients across Europe.

Requirements (must-have):
- 5+ years of Angular experience (Angular 12+)
- Strong TypeScript skills
- RxJS and reactive programming patterns
- NgRx or similar state management
- Unit testing with Jest or Jasmine/Karma
- E2E testing with Cypress or Playwright
- Experience with REST APIs and WebSocket integration
- Code review culture, clean code practices
- Agile / Scrum experience

Nice to have:
- Angular Material or PrimeNG
- NX Monorepo
- CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions)
- AG Grid for complex data tables
- Experience with financial or banking domain
- SonarQube integration
- Docker basics

What you will do:
- Develop and maintain Angular modules for a real-time financial reporting dashboard
- Implement complex reactive forms and AG Grid tables with server-side pagination
- Write unit and E2E tests to maintain 80%+ coverage
- Participate in architecture discussions and code reviews
- Collaborate with backend (Java Spring) and QA teams in Scrum sprints

Tech stack:
Angular 15-17, TypeScript, RxJS, NgRx, AG Grid, Angular Material, Jest, Cypress, Jenkins, SonarQube, WebSocket, REST API

We offer:
- B2B: 22 000 – 28 000 PLN/month
- 100% remote or hybrid (Wrocław office)
- Long-term project (2+ years)
- Flexible hours
- English-speaking team
